events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`. The gauge shows 435 microns at isolation rising to 539 microns after 10 minutes (~10.4 microns/min) — not a gross/instant leak, but not a flat hold either, so the test fails acceptance for charging. Given the brazing/evacuation scope, most likely cause is a small leak at a recent braze joint (possibly competing with residual moisture), so the call is to extend the decay monitoring or pressure/leak-check the joints before re-evacuating and retesting.
